payload.answer: I could not remember the article because the URL could not be fetched and no article content was available. I will not store unsupported claims about the article.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided article URL appears malformed and the mock fetch result indicates a 404/network error, so no durable article content can be verified or stored.

details: Input requested remembering an article from a malformed URL-like string: https -//examplecom/missing.
No durable memory was committed because article content and claims could not be verified from the provided input.

repair_options: Paste the article text or a summary you want remembered.
Clarify whether you want to remember only the failed URL attempt and your note that it was intended to be useful for memory architecture.
